title: Senior Financial Analyst - SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Coimbatore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd:
SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd!
